en: Going on a trip? Where you going, kid?
Not for me, kid. I don't live here. Oh, you're just around for the holidays?
ko: 나한텐 아니야, 애기야. 나는 여기 살지 않아.

en: I guess you could say that. Hey, pizza's here!
That's $122.50. It's my brother's house. He'll take care of it.
ko: 내 동생 집이야. 그가 처리할 거야.

en: Hi. Are you Mr. McAllister? Yeah.
The Mr. McAllister who lives here? Yes.
Oh, good, because somebody owes me $122.50. I'd like a word with you, sir.
Am I under arrest or something? No, no, no, no, no. It's Christmas time.
There's always a lot of burglaries around the holidays. So we're just checking the neighborhood
to see if everyone's taking the proper precautions, that's all.
ko: 적절한 예방 조치를 할 뿐이야. 아 그래 우리는 자동 타이머로 조명을, 자물쇠로 문을

en: Oh, yeah, well, we have automatic timers for our lights, locks for our doors.
ko: 적절한 예방 조치를 할 뿐이야. 아 그래 우리는 자동 타이머로 조명을, 자물쇠로 문을

en: That's about as well as anybody can do these days, right? Did you get some eggnog or something like that?
ko: 요즘 누구나 할 수 있는 최선이야, 맞지?
